title: Sell AI Art Online: Midjourney & Leonardo Guide

reels.caption: #AIart #Midjourney #LeonardoAI #AIartBusiness #DigitalArt

reels.script: Watch as we transform a simple text into stunning AI art using ChatGPT! First, input your creative idea, then let ChatGPT craft the perfect prompt for Midjourney. Voilà, market-ready art in seconds!
reels.caption: #AItools #ChatGPT #CreateWithAI #AIart

reels.hook: Create your first AI art sale in just 5 steps!
